patch.value: Context judgment corpus: small, real-shaped, scale, and returning-agent continuity scenarios for pm context/next
Create the graded scenario corpus that defines what good context assembly means across workspace size and time-gap dimensions.

Corpus includes a tiny scratch workspace, a real-shaped medium workspace, synthetic pm-mi2x scale fixtures, and continuity cases from pm-bwyw; each scenario records focus/query/claim state, expected item grades, token budget, and rationale; corpus format is documented and reviewable; phase-1 judgments baseline current structural context behavior before pm-4k6b changes ranking.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for context eval corpus/golden workspace/continuity judgments; only pm-atfm and closed search-eval work matched.
